rationale: Both correctly diagnose the core_model→dummy-weight run-level issue and correctly land on 'invalid' matching the actual thread resolution, with matching fix commands. X fabricates specific evidence not present anywhere in the issue log — an invented Welsh-language audio transcript quote — which is a serious grounding problem since no audio content was ever shown in the reporter's log, casting doubt on its other hyper-specific line-number citations too. Y avoids that fabrication and more accurately attributes the resolution to akshatvishu's debug log and yenuo26's A100 verification, though it has a minor internal inconsistency (structured 'disposition: keep-open' contradicts its own prose stating the issue was closed as invalid).
